discover_bike.description: Discover your VanMoof bike using the provided account details.

select_bike.description: Select the VanMoof bike you want to add.

init.description: Set how often Home Assistant polls the bike, in seconds.

errors.auth_error: Could not log in. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.no_vanmoof_bike_found: Login succeeded, but no VanMoof bike was found nearby.
errors.bike_discovery_failed: Unable to discover the bike. Make sure Bluetooth is enabled and the bike is within range.
